fallback: Used book2skill plus skill-creator-style distillation because this runtime has no local cangjie skill available.

supplementalMetadata.reason: The assigned source is a bibliographic page with abstract and citation metadata, not a full book chapter or complete architectural excerpt, so minimal theory metadata and MAPE-K auto-orchestrator mapping were supplemented.
supplementalMetadata.domain: self-managing computing systems and closed-loop runtime control
autoOrchestratorMapping: Monitor runtime telemetry and normalize it into decision-ready state
Analyze state against goals, policies, baselines, and risk
Plan bounded remediation, optimization, configuration, or protection actions
Execute actions through audited, idempotent effectors
Maintain shared knowledge of goals, topology, state, policies, history, and action outcomes

runtimeDependencyPolicy: Closed skill: execute from SKILL.md; use references/source-notes.md only as local optional provenance; do not require external source folders, webpages, original books, source reports, machine-local paths, or cross-skill files.

qualityChecks: SKILL.md has trigger and non-trigger guidance
SKILL.md has standalone runtime contract and activation/execution gate
SKILL.md has workflow, output deliverables, failure/recovery/idempotency, boundaries, and hard rules
test-prompts.json includes should_trigger, should_not_trigger, edge_cases, and compliance_expectations
audit.json preserves sourceFiles and marks all source material as provenance-only
